articles.title: EU Parliament Passes Controversial Rules Banning Anonymous Crypto Transactions
articles.description: The European Union (EU) parliament has today voted in favor of new harsh rules that call for the crackdown of unhosted or non-custodial wallets. This is a big blow for cryptocurrency privacy advocates in Europe.
